overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a street food vendor cooking in a neon-lit stall at night. The character actively prepares food in a large wok before moving away, allowing the camera to pan across the interior counter area where steam rises from displayed food.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food cooking station with wok and service window

agents.ego_description: actively cooking with a large wok, tossing and stirring ingredients over a high-heat stove while facing the service window

notable_agents.action: two customers sitting at a counter visible through the glass service window

entered.detail: large round cooking wok sitting on a gas burner with food being tossed inside
commercial gas burner setup with blue flame visible beneath the wok
traditional red paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging outside the service window
wall-mounted television displaying a broadcast with changing images and text
large open window facing the street with metal security grating
illuminated neon sign with '24' visible indicating 24-hour service
wooden counter with stacked bowls and preparation materials

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk street food stall at night, illuminated by neon lights. The chef character is actively cooking at a wok station, tossing ingredients while steam rises. Red paper lanterns hang visible through the service window, and a TV screen glows on the left wall. Two customers can be seen sitting at a counter outside through the glass window.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from cooking station to interior food preparation area

events.description: chef stops cooking and begins moving away from the wok station toward the right
camera pans left to reveal the interior food warming counter and preparation area

agents.ego_description: finishing the cooking process and moving away from the stove toward the right side of the stall, exiting the frame

entered.detail: heated display counter with glass shield containing prepared food items
large cylindrical metal rice cooker sitting on the prep table

segments.scene_description: The chef finishes cooking and moves away from the wok station as the camera begins panning left. The focus shifts from the active cooking area to the interior preparation counter, revealing a metal rice cooker and food warming station. The wok remains on the stove in the background while the neon signage exits view.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior food display and preparation counter with warming lights

events.description: steam becomes visibly rising from the food on the warming counter as the camera settles

agents.ego_description: camera observes the empty interior space, focusing on the food display counter and steam rising from prepared dishes

entered.detail: visible steam and smoke rising from the heated food on the warming station

segments.scene_description: The camera settles on the interior counter area of the stall, now devoid of the chef. Steam rises from food displayed under warming lights on the central counter. The TV screen continues to glow in the background while the cooking station and street view are no longer visible, creating an intimate view of the empty food preparation space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the energetic activity of a neon-lit street food stall to a quiet, intimate view of its interior preparation area. It begins focused on a chef actively tossing ingredients in a steaming wok, with red paper lanterns and customers visible through the service window. As the chef finishes cooking and moves away, the camera pans left, transitioning from the active stove toward the inner counter where a metal rice cooker and warming station come into view. The scene then expands across the interior workspace as the neon signage and street view fade from sight, leaving the glowing TV screen in the background. Finally, the camera settles on the central counter, where steam rises from displayed food under warming lights in the now-empty preparation space.
